headline: JPMorgan Weighs US$20b Deal While Expanding In Europe And Crypto Debate
summary: JPMorgan Chase (NYSE:JPM) CEO Jamie Dimon flagged the possibility of a roughly US$20b acquisition, which would be the largest deal under his leadership. The bank is continuing to push into European retail banking, expanding its presence beyond its core US franchise. Dimon has also criticized current crypto-focused legislation, including the CLARITY Act, and questioned the influence of major crypto industry representatives.
